sections.section_purpose: To provide detailed pricing information as required by the tender.
sections.response_guidance: Complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender. Reference annexes where required. Include pricing on the basis of: Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), Combination of T&M and Fixed Price, Other.

sections.section_purpose: To confirm acceptance or propose deviations from the draft contract terms.
sections.response_guidance: State acceptance of, or proposed deviations from, the draft contract terms. Include a PDF copy of the Supplier’s Deed of Undertaking in the form attached duly signed by the Supplier.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the project management approach and ensure alignment with the tender requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the project management methodology, governance structure, and reporting approach. Ensure the Services are provided in accordance with the Deed and the Work Order, achieving the Milestones and/or Critical Milestones by the relevant Milestone Dates.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the service management framework and support structure.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the service management framework, including ITSM processes, SLAs, and escalation paths. Include details on Level Zero to Level Four support for DDM services.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the approach to transitioning services in and out.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the approach to transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate past performance and technical merit through relevant experience.
sections.response_guidance: Provide two or more case studies demonstrating relevant experience. Reference case study files from `case_studies/`. Address evaluation criteria including Methodology, Past Performance, Technical Merit, Pricing, Compliance.

sections.section_purpose: To provide a summary of the company's background and relevance to the opportunity.
sections.response_guidance: Provide a summary of the company's background, size, structure, and relevance to this opportunity. Include details on completing and submitting an AIC Schedule or AIC Plan as applicable.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the technical approach to meet the stated requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the proposed technical approach to meet the stated requirements. Address the need for remediation of eTools documentation during the software development lifecycle.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the project management approach and ensure alignment with the tender requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the project management methodology, governance structure, and reporting approach. Include details on providing reports in accordance with the agreed format and delivery method.

sections.section_purpose: To provide essential submission details and ensure compliance with lodgement procedures.
sections.response_guidance: Ensure quotations are lodged electronically via AusTender before the Closing Time in accordance with the Quotation lodgement procedures set out in this RFQ and on AusTender.
